---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new widget, API improvement, or capability
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear description of the feature you'd like.

## Use Case
Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Implementation
If you have ideas on how to implement it, describe them here.

## Widget Type (if applicable)
- [ ] New widget type (describe layout and behavior)
- [ ] Enhancement to existing widget
- [ ] Core API improvement
- [ ] Build/tooling improvement

## Additional Context
Any other context, mockups, or references.
